sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111626" key="filtroki/nhtos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φιλτρο-κίνητος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[κῑ]</pron>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n111626.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">excited by lovepotions,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Tz.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Proll.Hes.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">p.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
